title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 20 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 20 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 20 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/08/2024
Iron ore futures ﬂuctuated strongly, with the most-traded contract I2501 closing at 710.5 yuan/mt, up 1.21% for the day. Traders followed the markettrend to sell. Steel mills were cautiously observing, mainly making small and frequent purchases.
